description: Comprehensive Mimir volume and throughput analytics. Tracks samples ingested, active series counts, distributor throughput, ingester capacity, compactor block sizes, query volume, and week-over-week growth trends.

panels.description: Rate of samples being ingested across all distributors. Primary throughput indicator for the write path.
panels.title: Samples Ingested/sec

panels.description: Total active time series across all ingesters. Key cardinality and volume indicator.
panels.title: Active Series

panels.description: Rate of exemplars being ingested. Exemplars link metrics to trace spans for deeper observability.
panels.title: Exemplars/sec

panels.description: Rate of push requests hitting the distributors. Indicates write-path demand volume.
panels.title: Write Request Rate

panels.description: Rate of query/read requests. Includes query, query_range, labels, and series endpoints.
panels.title: Query Request Rate

panels.description: Rate of samples being discarded. Non-zero values indicate validation failures, rate limiting, or quota issues.
panels.title: Discarded Samples/sec

panels.description: Samples ingested per second broken down by cluster. Spikes may indicate new scrape targets or config changes.
panels.title: Samples/sec by Cluster

panels.description: Total active series per cluster. Tracks cardinality growth across environments.
panels.title: Active Series by Cluster

panels.description: Top 15 tenants by active series count. Identifies the heaviest cardinality contributors.
panels.title: Top 15 Tenants by Active Series

panels.description: Top 15 tenants by samples ingested per second. Shows who is driving the most write volume.
panels.title: Top 15 Tenants by Samples/sec

panels.description: Write (push) request volume broken down by HTTP status code. Stacked view shows total volume with error proportion.
panels.title: Write Request Volume

panels.description: Read request volume for query, query_range, labels, and series routes. Stacked by status code.
panels.title: Read/Query Request Volume

panels.description: Active series count per ingester pod. Uneven distribution may indicate rebalancing issues or hot ingesters.
panels.title: Active Series per Ingester

panels.description: Head chunks per ingester pod. High values indicate memory pressure and possible OOM risk.
panels.title: Head Chunks per Ingester

panels.description: Compaction throughput measured in bytes processed and compaction operations. High compaction volume is normal for active clusters.
panels.title: Compaction Volume

panels.description: Rate of TSDB block uploads from ingesters to long-term storage. Tracks the storage write pipeline throughput.
panels.title: Block Uploads

panels.description: Compare current active series count against 7 days ago. Useful for identifying growth trends and capacity planning.
panels.title: Active Series — Current vs 7d Ago

panels.description: Compare current sample ingestion rate against 7 days ago. Shows whether write volume is growing or shrinking week-over-week.
panels.title: Samples Rate — Current vs 7d Ago

panels.description: Correlation between ingestion volume (samples/sec) and write latency (P99). Useful for identifying saturation points where increased volume degrades performance.
panels.title: Ingestion Volume vs Write Latency

panels.description: Discarded samples broken down by reason. Common reasons include: rate_limited, new_value_for_timestamp, sample_out_of_order, sample_too_old, per_user_series_limit.
panels.title: Discarded Samples by Reason

title: Mimir — Volume & Throughput Analytics
